Features • Download • Quick Start • Security • Contributing 🆕 Agentic Power Why Comet? Most browsers are built for monetization. Comet is built for control. 🧠 Autonomous AI agent that can browse, search, and act on your behalf 🔒 Privacy-first — local LLM support via Ollama, no cloud required 💻 OS-level automation with explicit human approval for every action ⚡ Optimized for low-spec hardware — tested on Intel i5-U, 8GB RAM, no GPU 📸 Screenshot embedding in PDFs — AI can capture and include screen images in reports 🔍 Secure DOM Reading — Filtered page extraction with injection detection 🌐 In-page DOM Search — AI can search within current page content ✨ Features (v0.2.3) 🤖 AI Agent Multi-step autonomous task execution via chained commands Real-time action queue with live progress tracking UI RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) using local vector memory Hybrid context: browser history + live web search results Thinking transparency — reasoning shown in collapsible \"ThinkingPanel\" <think> tag parsing for DeepSeek-style chain-of-thought models [EXPLAIN_CAPABILITIES] — Real-time demo: searches news, adjusts volume, opens apps, captures screenshots, generates PDF reports Full Agentic Control — CLICK, FILL_FORM, SCROLL, and COORDINATE-based interaction Accelerated Action Chains — Optimized search-to-navigation loop with minimal latency 🌐 Browser Capabilities Full Chromium-based browsing via Electron BrowserView Tab management with groups Secure DOM extraction with PII scrubbing and injection detection In-page DOM search — AI can search text within current page OCR-based screen reading (Tesseract.js) Screenshot capture with visual analysis Built-in ad blocker (~99% accuracy) 📄 Document & Productivity Live PDF Streaming — Watch reports being generated in real-time Slide-based Generation — Use --- in markdown to create multi-page slides (Presenton logic) Enhanced PDF generation with native tables, bold fonts, and custom branding Screenshot embedding in PDFs — AI captures and includes screen images in reports Single-prompt branded reports — Custom headers/footers with Comet icon Unified search & cart manager — Search apps, settings, and web in one shortcut One-Click Tab Group Closure — Instantly close all AI-opened tabs 🛡️ Security Model Triple-Lock Architecture (see Security section) Prompt injection detection with strike-based banning PII scrubbing before content reaches the LLM Injection pattern detection in DOM reading All shell commands and native clicks require explicit user approval Read-only DOM mode with automatic security filtering 🤖 AI Provider Support Provider Type Notes Google Gemini Cloud Default recommended OpenAI GPT Cloud GPT-4 and above Anthropic Claude Cloud Strong for long context Groq Cloud Fastest inference Ollama Local Full privacy, no API key 🔧 Real Capabilities Demo When you use [EXPLAIN_CAPABILITIES], Comet AI demonstrates: Web Search — Fetches latest news in real-time Shell Commands — Retrieves WiFi/network information System Control — Adjusts volume and brightness App Launching — Opens Calculator (macOS/Windows/Linux) Screenshot Capture — Takes and embeds screen images PDF Generation — Creates branded reports with screenshots 🛡️ Security Comet does not rely on LLM guardrails alone. It enforces architectural isolation at three levels. 1. Visual Sandbox The agent perceives pages via screenshots + OCR only. It never parses or executes raw HTML or JavaScript. This prevents hidden prompt injection via DOM manipulation. 2. Syntactic Firewall Before any content reaches the LLM, dangerous patterns are filtered: Shell execution primitives (rm -rf, powershell, sudo) Encoded payloads and obfuscated commands Prompt injection attempts (jailbreak patterns, role-override attempts) 3. Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) Every native OS action — clicking outside the browser, running shell commands, opening apps — requires explicit user approval via a permission modal. Low/Medium Risk: Can be approved instantly with Shift+Tab. High Risk: Shows a QR code for secure Cross-Device Authorization. Scan it with Comet Mobile app to view and match a 6-digit PIN before the action is unblocked. The AI generates intent, not execution. Even if socially engineered, it cannot act without your approval. ⚡ Performance Engineered to run well on modest hardware. Metric Value Speedometer 3 ~12–14 ms Cold Start < 2 seconds Electron RAM Usage ~462–500 MB Agent Response (Claude API) ~3–5s Test machine: Intel i5-U · 8GB RAM · SATA SSD · No GPU 📦 Installation Prerequisites Node.js 18+ npm or yarn (Optional) Ollama for local AI Desktop (Windows / macOS / Linux) git clone https://github.com/Preet3627/Comet-AI.git cd Comet-AI/comet-browser npm install npm run dev # Next.js frontend npm run electron-start # Electron shell Mobile (Android) cd flutter_browser_app flutter pub get flutter run Production APK builds are available on the Releases page. 📖 Full documentation: https://browser.ponsrischool.in 🚀 Development Status Platform Status Windows ✅ Production Ready macOS ✅ Production Ready Linux ✅ Production Ready Android ✅ Production Ready iOS 🧪 Testing Phase 🗺️ Roadmap Native Chromium core (replace Electron BrowserView) Fully offline LLM (1.5B–3B parameter models) Extension marketplace Multi-agent collaborative workspace Granular OS tool permission profiles 👥 Contributing PRs are welcome. Please open an issue first to discuss significant changes. Special thanks to Otherwise_Wave9374 for contributions to tool permission gating and agent loop refinement. 🧑‍💻 About Comet AI Browser is built by a 16-year-old student from India, preparing for JEE, on a intel i5 pc with integrated intel UHD graphics 8GB ram. Efficient architecture beats expensive hardware. 📝 License MIT © 2026 Comet-AI About A privacy-first, AI-native browser built with Electron & Next.js. Run local LLMs via Ollama or connect to Gemini/OpenAI. Features include AI page actions, E2EE sync, Chrome extension support, and a PDF study workspace. No tracking, fully open-source, and optimized for performance. Experience browsing where your data stays yours.@Comet-AI Preet3627. browser-ai-comet-browser.vercel.app Resources Readme License MIT license Contributing Contributing Uh oh! human approval for every action ⚡ Optimized for low-spec hardware — tested on Intel i5-U, 8GB RAM, no GPU 📸 Screenshot embedding in PDFs — AI can capture and include screen images in reports 🔍 Secure DOM Reading — Filtered page extraction with injection detection 🌐 In-page DOM Search — AI can search within current page content ✨ Features (v0.2.3) 🤖 AI Agent Multi-step autonomous task execution via chained commands Real-time action queue with live progress tracking UI RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) using local vector memory Hybrid context: browser history + live web search results Thinking transparency — reasoning shown in collapsible \"ThinkingPanel\" <think> tag parsing for DeepSeek-style chain-of-thought models [EXPLAIN_CAPABILITIES] — Real-time demo: searches news, adjusts volume, opens apps, captures screenshots, generates PDF reports Full Agentic Control — CLICK, FILL_FORM, SCROLL, and COORDINATE-based interaction Accelerated Action Chains — Optimized search-to-navigation loop with minimal latency 🌐 Browser Capabilities Full Chromium-based browsing via Electron BrowserView Tab management with groups Secure DOM extraction with PII scrubbing and injection detection In-page DOM search — AI can search text within current page OCR-based screen reading (Tesseract.js) Screenshot capture with visual analysis Built-in ad blocker (~99% accuracy) 📄 Document & Productivity Live PDF Streaming — Watch reports being generated in real-time Slide-based Generation — Use --- in markdown to create multi-page slides (Presenton logic) Enhanced PDF generation with native tables, bold fonts, and custom branding Screenshot embedding in PDFs — AI captures and includes screen images in reports Single-prompt branded reports — Custom headers/footers with Comet icon Unified search & cart manager — Search apps, settings, and web in one shortcut One-Click Tab Group Closure — Instantly close all AI-opened tabs 🛡️ Security Model Triple-Lock Architecture (see Security section) Prompt injection detection with strike-based banning PII scrubbing before content reaches the LLM Injection pattern detection in DOM reading All shell commands and native clicks require explicit user approval Read-only DOM mode with automatic security filtering 🤖 AI Provider Support Provider Type Notes Google Gemini Cloud Default recommended OpenAI GPT Cloud GPT-4 and above Anthropic Claude Cloud Strong for long context Groq Cloud Fastest inference Ollama Local Full privacy, no API key 🔧 Real Capabilities Demo When you use [EXPLAIN_CAPABILITIES], Comet AI demonstrates: Web Search — Fetches latest news in real-time Shell Commands — Retrieves WiFi/network information System Control — Adjusts volume and brightness App Launching — Opens Calculator (macOS/Windows/Linux) Screenshot Capture — Takes and embeds screen images PDF Generation — Creates branded reports with screenshots 🛡️ Security Comet does not rely on LLM guardrails alone. It enforces architectural isolation at three levels. 1. Visual Sandbox The agent perceives pages via screenshots + OCR only. It never parses or executes raw HTML or JavaScript. This prevents hidden prompt injection via DOM manipulation. 2. Syntactic Firewall Before any content reaches the LLM, dangerous patterns are filtered: Shell execution primitives (rm -rf, powershell, sudo) Encoded payloads and obfuscated commands Prompt injection attempts (jailbreak patterns, role-override attempts) 3. Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) Every native OS action — clicking outside the browser, running shell commands, opening apps — requires explicit user approval via a permission modal. Low/Medium Risk: Can be approved instantly with Shift+Tab. High Risk: Shows a QR code for secure Cross-Device Authorization. Scan it with Comet Mobile app to view and match a 6-digit PIN before the action is unblocked. The AI generates intent, not execution. Even if socially engineered, it cannot act without your approval. ⚡ Performance Engineered to run well on modest hardware. Metric Value Speedometer 3 ~12–14 ms Cold Start < 2 seconds Electron RAM Usage ~462–500 MB Agent Response (Claude API) ~3–5s Test machine: Intel i5-U · 8GB RAM · SATA SSD · No GPU 📦 Installation Prerequisites Node.js 18+ npm or yarn (Optional) Ollama for local AI Desktop (Windows / macOS / Linux) git clone https://github.com/Preet3627/Comet-AI.git cd Comet-AI/comet-browser npm install npm run dev # Next.js frontend npm run electron-start # Electron shell Mobile (Android) cd flutter_browser_app flutter pub get flutter run Production APK builds are available on the Releases page. 📖 Full documentation: https://browser.ponsrischool.in 🚀 Development Status Platform Status Windows ✅ Production Ready macOS ✅ Production Ready Linux ✅ Production Ready Android ✅ Production Ready iOS 🧪 Testing Phase 🗺️ Roadmap Native Chromium core (replace Electron BrowserView) Fully offline LLM (1.5B–3B parameter models) Extension marketplace Multi-agent collaborative workspace Granular OS tool permission profiles 👥 Contributing PRs are welcome. Low/Medium Risk: Can be approved instantly with Shift+Tab. High Risk: Shows a QR code for secure Cross-Device Authorization. Scan it with Comet Mobile app to view and match a 6-digit PIN before the action is unblocked. The AI generates intent, not execution. 🌟 Comet AI Browser
Comet AI Browser

An open-source, AI-native browser with permission-gated OS automation.

License: MIT Platform Version PRs Welcome Built by 16yo Low Spec

Features • Download • Quick Start • Security • Contributing

🆕 Agentic Power

Why Comet?
Most browsers are built for monetization. Comet is built for control.

🧠 Autonomous AI agent that can browse, search, and act on your behalf
🔒 Privacy-first — local LLM support via Ollama, no cloud required
💻 OS-level automation with explicit human approval for every action
⚡ Optimized for low-spec hardware — tested on Intel i5-U, 8GB RAM, no GPU
📸 Screenshot embedding in PDFs — AI can capture and include screen images in reports
🔍 Secure DOM Reading — Filtered page extraction with injection detection
🌐 In-page DOM Search — AI can search within current page content
✨ Features (v0.2.3)
🤖 AI Agent
Multi-step autonomous task execution via chained commands
Real-time action queue with live progress tracking UI
RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) using local vector memory
Hybrid context: browser history + live web search results
Thinking transparency — reasoning shown in collapsible "ThinkingPanel"
<think> tag parsing for DeepSeek-style chain-of-thought models
[EXPLAIN_CAPABILITIES] — Real-time demo: searches news, adjusts volume, opens apps, captures screenshots, generates PDF reports
Full Agentic Control — CLICK, FILL_FORM, SCROLL, and COORDINATE-based interaction
Accelerated Action Chains — Optimized search-to-navigation loop with minimal latency
🌐 Browser Capabilities
Full Chromium-based browsing via Electron BrowserView
Tab management with groups
Secure DOM extraction with PII scrubbing and injection detection
In-page DOM search — AI can search text within current page
OCR-based screen reading (Tesseract.js)
Screenshot capture with visual analysis
Built-in ad blocker (~99% accuracy)
📄 Document & Productivity
Live PDF Streaming — Watch reports being generated in real-time
Slide-based Generation — Use --- in markdown to create multi-page slides (Presenton logic)
Enhanced PDF generation with native tables, bold fonts, and custom branding
Screenshot embedding in PDFs — AI captures and includes screen images in reports
Single-prompt branded reports — Custom headers/footers with Comet icon
Unified search & cart manager — Search apps, settings, and web in one shortcut
One-Click Tab Group Closure — Instantly close all AI-opened tabs
🛡️ Security Model
Triple-Lock Architecture (see Security section)
Prompt injection detection with strike-based banning
PII scrubbing before content reaches the LLM
Injection pattern detection in DOM reading
All shell commands and native clicks require explicit user approval
Read-only DOM mode with automatic security filtering
🤖 AI Provider Support
Provider	Type	Notes
Google Gemini	Cloud	Default recommended
OpenAI GPT	Cloud	GPT-4 and above
Anthropic Claude	Cloud	Strong for long context
Groq	Cloud	Fastest inference
Ollama	Local	Full privacy, no API key
🔧 Real Capabilities Demo
When you use [EXPLAIN_CAPABILITIES], Comet AI demonstrates:

Web Search — Fetches latest news in real-time
Shell Commands — Retrieves WiFi/network information
System Control — Adjusts volume and brightness
App Launching — Opens Calculator (macOS/Windows/Linux)
Screenshot Capture — Takes and embeds screen images
PDF Generation — Creates branded reports with screenshots
🛡️ Security
Comet does not rely on LLM guardrails alone. It enforces architectural isolation at three levels.

1. Visual Sandbox
The agent perceives pages via screenshots + OCR only. It never parses or executes raw HTML or JavaScript. This prevents hidden prompt injection via DOM manipulation.

2. Syntactic Firewall
Before any content reaches the LLM, dangerous patterns are filtered:

Shell execution primitives (rm -rf, powershell, sudo)
Encoded payloads and obfuscated commands
Prompt injection attempts (jailbreak patterns, role-override attempts)
3. Human-in-the-Loop (HITL)
Every native OS action — clicking outside the browser, running shell commands, opening apps — requires explicit user approval via a permission modal.

Low/Medium Risk: Can be approved instantly with Shift+Tab.
High Risk: Shows a QR code for secure Cross-Device Authorization. Scan it with Comet Mobile app to view and match a 6-digit PIN before the action is unblocked.
The AI generates intent, not execution. Even if socially engineered, it cannot act without your approval.

⚡ Performance
Engineered to run well on modest hardware.

Metric	Value
Speedometer 3	~12–14 ms
Cold Start	< 2 seconds
Electron RAM Usage	~462–500 MB
Agent Response (Claude API)	~3–5s
Test machine: Intel i5-U · 8GB RAM · SATA SSD · No GPU

📦 Installation
Prerequisites
Node.js 18+
npm or yarn
(Optional) Ollama for local AI
Desktop (Windows / macOS / Linux)
git clone https://github.com/Preet3627/Comet-AI.git
cd Comet-AI/comet-browser
npm install
npm run dev          # Next.js frontend
npm run electron-start  # Electron shell
Mobile (Android)
cd flutter_browser_app
flutter pub get
flutter run
Production APK builds are available on the Releases page.

📖 Full documentation: https://browser.ponsrischool.in

🚀 Development Status
Platform	Status
Windows	✅ Production Ready
macOS	✅ Production Ready
Linux	✅ Production Ready
Android	✅ Production Ready
iOS	🧪 Testing Phase
🗺️ Roadmap
 Native Chromium core (replace Electron BrowserView)
 Fully offline LLM (1.5B–3B parameter models)
 Extension marketplace
 Multi-agent collaborative workspace
 Granular OS tool permission profiles
👥 Contributing
PRs are welcome. Please open an issue first to discuss significant changes.

Special thanks to Otherwise_Wave9374 for contributions to tool permission gating and agent loop refinement.

🧑‍💻 About
Comet AI Browser is built by a 16-year-old student from India, preparing for JEE, on a intel i5 pc with integrated intel UHD graphics 8GB ram.

Efficient architecture beats expensive hardware.

📝 License
MIT © 2026 Comet-AI

About
A privacy-first, AI-native browser built with Electron & Next.js. Run local LLMs via Ollama or connect to Gemini/OpenAI. Features include AI page actions, E2EE sync, Chrome extension support, and a PDF study workspace. No tracking, fully open-source, and optimized for performance. Experience browsing where your data stays yours.@Comet-AI Preet3627.

browser-ai-comet-browser.vercel.app

Features • Download • Quick Start • Security • Contributing 🆕 Agentic Power Why Comet? Most browsers are built for monetization. Comet is built for control. 🧠 Autonomous AI agent that can browse, search, and act on your behalf 🔒 Privacy-first — local LLM support via Ollama, no cloud required 💻 OS-level automation with explicit human approval for every action ⚡ Optimized for low-spec hardware — tested on Intel i5-U, 8GB RAM, no GPU 📸 Screenshot embedding in PDFs — AI can capture and include screen images in reports 🔍 Secure DOM Reading — Filtered page extraction with injection detection 🌐 In-page DOM Search — AI can search within current page content ✨ Features (v0.2.3) 🤖 AI Agent Multi-step autonomous task execution via chained commands Real-time action queue with live progress tracking UI RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) using local vector memory Hybrid context: browser history + live web search results Thinking transparency — reasoning shown in collapsible \"ThinkingPanel\" <think> tag parsing for DeepSeek-style chain-of-thought models [EXPLAIN_CAPABILITIES] — Real-time demo: searches news, adjusts volume, opens apps, captures screenshots, generates PDF reports Full Agentic Control — CLICK, FILL_FORM, SCROLL, and COORDINATE-based interaction Accelerated Action Chains — Optimized search-to-navigation loop with minimal latency 🌐 Browser Capabilities Full Chromium-based browsing via Electron BrowserView Tab management with groups Secure DOM extraction with PII scrubbing and injection detection In-page DOM search — AI can search text within current page OCR-based screen reading (Tesseract.js) Screenshot capture with visual analysis Built-in ad blocker (~99% accuracy) 📄 Document & Productivity Live PDF Streaming — Watch reports being generated in real-time Slide-based Generation — Use --- in markdown to create multi-page slides (Presenton logic) Enhanced PDF generation with native tables, bold fonts, and custom branding Screenshot embedding in PDFs — AI captures and includes screen images in reports Single-prompt branded reports — Custom headers/footers with Comet icon Unified search & cart manager — Search apps, settings, and web in one shortcut One-Click Tab Group Closure — Instantly close all AI-opened tabs 🛡️ Security Model Triple-Lock Architecture (see Security section) Prompt injection detection with strike-based banning PII scrubbing before content reaches the LLM Injection pattern detection in DOM reading All shell commands and native clicks require explicit user approval Read-only DOM mode with automatic security filtering 🤖 AI Provider Support Provider Type Notes Google Gemini Cloud Default recommended OpenAI GPT Cloud GPT-4 and above Anthropic Claude Cloud Strong for long context Groq Cloud Fastest inference Ollama Local Full privacy, no API key 🔧 Real Capabilities Demo When you use [EXPLAIN_CAPABILITIES], Comet AI demonstrates: Web Search — Fetches latest news in real-time Shell Commands — Retrieves WiFi/network information System Control — Adjusts volume and brightness App Launching — Opens Calculator (macOS/Windows/Linux) Screenshot Capture — Takes and embeds screen images PDF Generation — Creates branded reports with screenshots 🛡️ Security Comet does not rely on LLM guardrails alone. It enforces architectural isolation at three levels. 1. Visual Sandbox The agent perceives pages via screenshots + OCR only. It never parses or executes raw HTML or JavaScript. This prevents hidden prompt injection via DOM manipulation. 2. Syntactic Firewall Before any content reaches the LLM, dangerous patterns are filtered: Shell execution primitives (rm -rf, powershell, sudo) Encoded payloads and obfuscated commands Prompt injection attempts (jailbreak patterns, role-override attempts) 3. Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) Every native OS action — clicking outside the browser, running shell commands, opening apps — requires explicit user approval via a permission modal. Low/Medium Risk: Can be approved instantly with Shift+Tab. High Risk: Shows a QR code for secure Cross-Device Authorization. Scan it with Comet Mobile app to view and match a 6-digit PIN before the action is unblocked. The AI generates intent, not execution. Even if socially engineered, it cannot act without your approval. ⚡ Performance Engineered to run well on modest hardware. Metric Value Speedometer 3 ~12–14 ms Cold Start < 2 seconds Electron RAM Usage ~462–500 MB Agent Response (Claude API) ~3–5s Test machine: Intel i5-U · 8GB RAM · SATA SSD · No GPU 📦 Installation Prerequisites Node.js 18+ npm or yarn (Optional) Ollama for local AI Desktop (Windows / macOS / Linux) git clone https://github.com/Preet3627/Comet-AI.git cd Comet-AI/comet-browser npm install npm run dev # Next.js frontend npm run electron-start # Electron shell Mobile (Android) cd flutter_browser_app flutter pub get flutter run Production APK builds are available on the Releases page. 📖 Full documentation: https://browser.ponsrischool.in 🚀 Development Status Platform Status Windows ✅ Production Ready macOS ✅ Production Ready Linux ✅ Production Ready Android ✅ Production Ready iOS 🧪 Testing Phase 🗺️ Roadmap Native Chromium core (replace Electron BrowserView) Fully offline LLM (1.5B–3B parameter models) Extension marketplace Multi-agent collaborative workspace Granular OS tool permission profiles 👥 Contributing PRs are welcome. Please open an issue first to discuss significant changes. Special thanks to Otherwise_Wave9374 for contributions to tool permission gating and agent loop refinement. 🧑‍💻 About Comet AI Browser is built by a 16-year-old student from India, preparing for JEE, on a intel i5 pc with integrated intel UHD graphics 8GB ram. Efficient architecture beats expensive hardware. 📝 License MIT © 2026 Comet-AI About A privacy-first, AI-native browser built with Electron & Next.js. Run local LLMs via Ollama or connect to Gemini/OpenAI. Features include AI page actions, E2EE sync, Chrome extension support, and a PDF study workspace. No tracking, fully open-source, and optimized for performance. Experience browsing where your data stays yours.@Comet-AI Preet3627. browser-ai-comet-browser.vercel.app Resources Readme License MIT license Contributing Contributing Uh oh!       "output": "$ curl -s https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Preet3627/Comet-AI/main/README.md\n# 🌟 Comet AI Browser\n\n<div align=\"center\">\n\n![Comet AI Browser](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Preet3627/Comet-AI/main/icon.ico)\n\n**An open-source, AI-native browser with permission-gated OS automation.**\n\n[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-cyan.svg)](LICENSE)\n[![Platform](https://img.shields.io/badge/Platform-Windows%20%7C%20macOS%20%7C%20Linux%20%7C%20Android-blue)]()\n[![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Version-0.2.3-blue)]()\n[![PRs Welcome](https://img.shields.io/badge/PRs-welcome-brightgreen.svg)]()\n[![Built by 16yo](https://img.shields.io/badge/Developer-16_Year_Old_Student-FF69B4?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/Preet3627)\n[![Low Spec](https://img.shields.io/badge/Tested_On-i5--U_|_8GB_RAM-orange)]()\n\n[Features](#-features) • [Download](#-download) • [Quick Start](#-quick-start) • [Security](#-security) • [Contributing](#-contributing)\n\n</div>\n\n---\n🆕 **Agentic Power**\n\n\n## Why Comet?\n\nMost browsers are built for monetization. Comet is built for **control**.\n\n- 🧠 Autonomous AI agent that can browse, search, and act on your behalf\n- 🔒 Privacy-first — local LLM support via Ollama, no cloud required\n- 💻 OS-level automation with explicit human approval for every action\n- ⚡ Optimized for low-spec hardware — tested on Intel i5-U, 8GB RAM, no GPU\n- 📸 **Screenshot embedding in PDFs** — AI can capture and include screen images in reports\n- 🔍 **Secure DOM Reading** — Filtered page extraction with injection detection\n- 🌐 **In-page DOM Search** — AI can search within current page content\n\n---\n\n## ✨ Features (v0.2.3)\n\n### 🤖 AI Agent\n- Multi-step autonomous task execution via chained commands\n- Real-time action queue with live progress tracking UI\n- RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) using local vector memory\n- Hybrid context: browser history + live web search results\n- Thinking transparency — reasoning shown in collapsible \"ThinkingPanel\"\n- `<think>` tag parsing for DeepSeek-style chain-of-thought models\n- **[EXPLAIN_CAPABILITIES]** — Real-time demo: searches news, adjusts volume, opens apps, captures screenshots, generates PDF reports\n- **Full Agentic Control** — CLICK, FILL_FORM, SCROLL, and COORDINATE-based interaction\n- **Accelerated Action Chains** — Optimized search-to-navigation loop with minimal latency\n\n### 🌐 Browser Capabilities\n- Full Chromium-based browsing via Electron BrowserView\n- Tab management with groups\n- **Secure DOM extraction** with PII scrubbing and injection detection\n- **In-page DOM search** — AI can search text within current page\n- OCR-based screen reading (Tesseract.js)\n- Screenshot capture with visual analysis\n- Built-in ad blocker (~99% accuracy)\n\n### 📄 Document & Productivity\n- **Live PDF Streaming** — Watch reports being generated in real-time\n- **Slide-based Generation** — Use `---` in markdown to create multi-page slides (Presenton logic)\n- **Enhanced PDF generation** with native tables, bold fonts, and custom branding\n- **Screenshot embedding in PDFs** — AI captures and includes screen images in reports\n- **Single-prompt branded reports** — Custom headers/footers with Comet icon\n- **Unified search & cart manager** — Search apps, settings, and web in one shortcut\n- **One-Click Tab Group Closure** — Instantly close all AI-opened tabs\n\n### 🛡️ Security Model\n- **Triple-Lock Architecture** (see [Security](#-security) section)\n- **Prompt injection detection** with strike-based banning\n- **PII scrubbing** before content reaches the LLM\n- **Injection pattern detection** in DOM reading\n- All shell commands and native clicks require explicit user approval\n- Read-only DOM mode with automatic security filtering\n\n### 🤖 AI Provider Support\n| Provider | Type | Notes |\n|----------|------|-------|\n| Google Gemini | Cloud | Default recommended |\n| OpenAI GPT | Cloud | GPT-4 and above |\n| Anthropic Claude | Cloud | Strong for long context |\n| Groq | Cloud | Fastest inference |\n| Ollama | Local | Full privacy, no API key |\n\n### 🔧 Real Capabilities Demo\n\nWhen you use `[EXPLAIN_CAPABILITIES]`, Comet AI demonstrates:\n\n1. **Web Search** — Fetches latest news in real-time\n2. **Shell Commands** — Retrieves WiFi/network information\n3. **System Control** — Adjusts volume and brightness\n4. **App Launching** — Opens Calculator (macOS/Windows/Linux)\n5. **Screenshot Capture** — Takes and embeds screen images\n6. **PDF Generation** — Creates branded reports with screenshots\n\n---\n\n## 🛡️ Security\n\nComet does **not** rely on LLM guardrails alone. It enforces **architectural isolation** at three levels.\n\n### 1. Visual Sandbox\nThe agent perceives pages via **screenshots + OCR only**. It never parses or executes raw HTML or JavaScript. This prevents hidden prompt injection via DOM manipulation.\n\n### 2. Syntactic Firewall\nBefore any content reaches the LLM, dangerous patterns are filtered:\n- Shell execution primitives (`rm -rf`, `powershell`, `sudo`)\n- Encoded payloads and obfuscated commands\n- Prompt injection attempts (jailbreak patterns, role-override attempts)\n\n### 3. Human-in-the-Loop (HITL)\nEvery native OS action — clicking outside the browser, running shell commands, opening apps — requires **explicit user approval** via a permission modal. \n- **Low/Medium Risk:** Can be approved instantly with `Shift+Tab`.\n- **High Risk:** Shows a QR code for secure **Cross-Device Authorization**. Scan it with Comet Mobile app to view and match a 6-digit PIN before the action is unblocked.\n\nThe AI generates **intent**, not execution. Even if socially engineered, it cannot act without your approval.\n\n---\n\n## ⚡ Performance\n\nEngineered to run well on modest hardware.\n\n| Metric | Value |\n|--------|-------|\n| Speedometer 3 | ~12–14 ms |\n| Cold Start | < 2 seconds |\n| Electron RAM Usage | ~462–500 MB |\n| Agent Response (Claude API) | ~3–5s |\n\n**Test machine:** Intel i5-U · 8GB RAM · SATA SSD · No GPU\n\n---\n\n## 📦 Installation\n\n### Prerequisites\n- Node.js 18+\n- npm or yarn\n- (Optional) [Ollama](https://ollama.com) for local AI\n\n### Desktop (Windows / macOS / Linux)\n\n```bash\ngit clone https://github.com/Preet3627/Comet-AI.git\ncd Comet-AI/comet-browser\nnpm install\nnpm run dev          # Next.js frontend\nnpm run electron-start  # Electron shell\n```\n\n### Mobile (Android)\n\n```bash\ncd flutter_browser_app\nflutter pub get\nflutter run\n```\n\nProduction APK builds are available on the [Releases](https://github.com/Preet3627/Comet-AI/releases) page.\n\n📖 Full documentation: **https://browser.ponsrischool.in**\n\n---\n\n## 🚀 Development Status\n\n| Platform | Status |\n|----------|--------|\n| Windows | ✅ Production Ready |\n| macOS | ✅ Production Ready |\n| Linux | ✅ Production Ready |\n| Android | ✅ Production Ready |\n| iOS | 🧪 Testing Phase |\n\n---\n\n## 🗺️ Roadmap\n\n- [ ] Native Chromium core (replace Electron BrowserView)\n- [ ] Fully offline LLM (1.5B–3B parameter models)\n- [ ] Extension marketplace\n- [ ] Multi-agent collaborative workspace\n- [ ] Granular OS tool permission profiles\n\n---\n\n## 👥 Contributing\n\nPRs are welcome. Please open an issue first to discuss significant changes.\n\nSpecial thanks to **Otherwise_Wave9374** for contributions to tool permission gating and agent loop refinement.\n\n---\n\n## 🧑‍💻 About\n\nComet AI Browser is built by a **16-year-old student** from India, preparing for JEE, on a intel i5 pc with integrated intel UHD graphics 8GB ram.\n\n> Efficient architecture beats expensive hardware.\n\n---\n\n## 📝 License\n\n[MIT](LICENSE) © 2026 Comet-AI"
    }
  ]
